applicability_notes: constraints: ['ttnn.clone does not work with L1 sharded tensors; input must be converted to interleaved (e.g., via ttnn.to_memory_config(x, ttnn.L1_MEMORY_CONFIG)) before cloning', 'For interleaved->interleaved memory location changes, clone allocates a new buffer (vs ttnn.move which reuses)']

placement_observations.source: call_site: 'ttnn.clone doesn't work with L1 sharded tensors' — noise_pred_text converted via ttnn.to_memory_config(noise_pred_text, ttnn.L1_MEMORY_CONFIG) before ttnn.clone

placement_observations.size_descriptor: decoder sample [batch, H, W, C] pre-reshape
placement_observations.source: call_site: sample = ttnn.clone(sample, memory_config=ttnn.L1_MEMORY_CONFIG, dtype=ttnn.bfloat16) after ttnn.to_memory_config(sample, ttnn.L1_MEMORY_CONFIG)
call_site: replicated_hidden_states = ttnn.clone(hidden_states, memory_config=self.model_config['DEFAULT_MEMCFG']); followed by typecast to BFP8 with ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG
call_site: return ttnn.clone(attention_mask, dtype=ttnn.bfloat4_b) — dtype-compression clone of causal mask built via tril + affine ops

call_site: interleaved-to-interleaved with different memory location: tensor = ttnn.clone(tensor, memory_config=output_memory_layout) (clone path) vs ttnn.move; sharded cases go through sharded_to_interleaved/interleaved_to_sharded instead
